title: Announce parse/format mismatch: Rust vs C for CCP-9 rx_channel in flags byte (P0 interop)
description: Rust (87c5112ee, announce.rs:91 'let rx_channel = data[1]') matches ccp9.json vector (encoded=15010200..., expected_flags=2) and 02a-coordinated-capacity.md:CCP-9 oracle but C (announce.c:233 'if (data[1] != 0U) return -EINVAL;', rx_channel=data[3], MIN_LEN=94) and spec/05-routing.md:430 ('Flags: Reserved', diagram without rx_channel in signed data) do not. Violates identical-output MUST in test/vectors/README.md and draft-lichen-link-01.md:107-112. Fix both impls + spec.
close_reason: Fixed parse/build mismatch for CCP-9 rx_channel in flags byte across Rust, C, tests, and spec. Now matches ccp9.json vectors, signed_data at offset 42, MIN_LEN=93, offsets updated (type@0, flags/rx@1, hop@2, seq@3-4, iid@5, etc.). Resolved merge conflicts in announce.rs. Updated 05-routing.md diagram and description.
